title: Jira Automation Rule Loop or Comment Storm Detection
app: Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud audit input
spl:
index=itsm sourcetype="jira:cloud:audit:log" OR sourcetype="jira:audit"
| search action="commented" OR method="comment"
| stats count by issue_key, actor
| where count>30
| sort -count
description: Runaway automation spams tickets and hides real human updates.
value: Catches feedback loops after bad JQL in Automation rules.
implementation: Throttle audit polling; correlate with rule deployment changes.

references.title: Source types — Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud
